title: WorkDoc Check Box
excerpt: Really liking the workDoc feature and finding more and more uses for it in different capacities. Feel one item that is needed is a check box. The checklist option is great, but in some cases have a check box that does no…

posts.author: BillBan (Bill Banford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Really liking the workDoc feature and finding more and more uses for it in different capacities. Feel one item that is needed is a check box. The checklist option is great, but in some cases have a check box that does not cross of the item.

In our specific instance (outdoor living pool design and build), am creating a workDoc that will be used by our sales team. There are checklist items that are there to ensure they go through the sales process properly. However, there will also be series of features that I want to be able to check off that the client may want. Not all of which they would. Rather than cross it off via a check list, a simple check box would be ideal.
